title: amaryllis × sexmaculata
intro: Amaryllis × sexmaculata, also known as the Naked Lady or Amaryllis belladonna, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Amaryllis × sexmaculata include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, among others. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations are also used in the form of extracts, tinctures, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
